summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 20/07/2023
The ship recycling activities have thus far exhibited a sluggish pace, characterized by a dearth of transactions. Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 2]
Highlights of the Week
The ship recycling activities have thus far exhibited a sluggish pace, characterized by a dearth of transactions. The current situation has exhibited minimal
changes in recent weeks, primarily due to the prevailing monsoon bombardment and the diminished state of the domestic steel markets.
